GR8_TECH: Industry pros backed Spain from World Cup day one
SBC News
2026-07-21
The betting industry knows its football according to gaming technology firm GR8_TECH The Cyprus company has released the data from its Team of Champions activation, an industry-focused initiative which invited industry figures to bet on the tournament. Out of the 48 answers, the four most-backed picks were Argentina, England, France and Spain, though the professionals […]

FeedConstruct adds elite football from Nicaragua to global offer
SBC News
2026-07-21
FeedConstruct will bring Nicaraguan top-tier football to its global network thanks to an exclusive deal that secures the streaming and data rights for Liga Primera and Copa Primera. The deal includes whistle-to-whistle live broadcasts of every game across the tournaments, significantly expanding FeedConstruct’s offering focused on sports coming out of the Americas, which adds another […]
https://sbcnews.co.uk/sportsbook/2026/07/21/feedconstruct-nicaragua/

Allwyn launches Powerball UK as next phase of National Lottery revamp
SBC News
2026-07-21
The hugely popular US lottery format of Powerball has landed in the UK as National Lottery operator Allwyn gets long-held plans in motion. Launching Powerball in the UK forms part of Allwyn UK’s strategy to revamp and expand the National Lottery with the end goal of doubling weekly returns to good causes by 2034. The […]
